question: Which was published first, Take It Easy or Personal Preference? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Take It Easy: Take It Easy is an abstract strategy board game created by Peter Burley. It has been published by Ravensburger and subsequently by several other publishers since 1983.
1.subquestion: Since when has Take It Easy been published?

2.fact: Personal Preference: Personal Preference is a 1987 board game created by Donal Carlston.

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Take It Easy has been published since 1983, while Personal Preference is a 1987 board game, so Take It Easy was published first. -> Take It Easy

reasoning_hops.reasoning: Node 1 and Node 2: Take It Easy has been published since 1983, while Personal Preference is a 1987 board game, so Take It Easy was published first. -> Take It Easy
